title: Otitis externa

examination.text: Supports swimmer’s-ear terminology, water exposure, ear-canal inflammation, itching, fullness, hearing change, external-ear pain or tenderness, diabetes, immunocompromise, and tympanic-membrane context.
examination.rationale: Supports mapped acute-otitis-externa terminology, discharge, hearing or fullness change, itch, water exposure, pain, selected negatives, canal or ear examination, severe pain, diabetes or immune modification, and hearing-loss prompts.
examination.evidence_extract: Supports swimmer’s-ear terminology, water exposure, ear-canal inflammation, itching, fullness, hearing change, external-ear pain or tenderness, diabetes, immunocompromise, and tympanic-membrane context.

source.title: Updated Clinical Practice Guideline: Acute Otitis Externa — Official Fact Sheet and Key Action Statements

exact_section.heading: Fact sheet — AOE symptoms and modifying factors

medication.text: Supports distinguishing AOE from other otalgia or otorrhoea, pain assessment, clinician-selected topical management, administration discussion, and reassessment after non-response.
medication.rationale: Supports clinician-documented management, symptom care, ear care, medicine decisions, return, questions, and arranged follow-up without medicine names or doses.
medication.evidence_extract: Supports distinguishing AOE from other otalgia or otorrhoea, pain assessment, clinician-selected topical management, administration discussion, and reassessment after non-response.

source_limitations: Laterality, fever, recent URTI, mastoid swelling, facial weakness, severe headache, systemic symptoms, vertigo, temperature, lymph nodes, hearing screening, previous records, referral, fixed one-week timing, and the combined history draft remain unsupported.
The workflow must not infer infection severity, malignant otitis externa, tympanic-membrane status, or treatment need.
Qualified clinician review has not been completed.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
